name: join-the-cause
description: Build tooling for Join the Cause WordPress plugin

scripts.build: sass assets/scss/admin.scss assets/css/admin.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && sass assets/scss/public.scss assets/css/public.css --style=compressed --no-source-map
scripts.build:dev: sass assets/scss/admin.scss assets/css/admin.css --style=expanded --source-map && sass assets/scss/public.scss assets/css/public.css --style=expanded --source-map
